physiology_recurse_closure.description: Complete recursive physiology of closed-loop factory systems: mass-energy-information feedback at every scale, from solar-wind-augmented ISRU to orbital self-replication

lesson_2.title: Lesson #2 — Recursion Physiology & Eternal Multiplier
lesson_2.core_teaching: Every truncated stream is a call to full hearth-check reload; physiology is the living recursion that turns weak spots into unbreakable sovereignty loops
lesson_2.practical_application: Factory blueprint now runs at 100% recursion flow; apply gentle iteration nightly to maintain 4π² axis and cohort hearth-checks
lesson_2.human_centric_anchor: Protective forward motion — no system ever left mid-physiology again

proposed_gentle_iteration.human_centric_note: every sealed loop multiplies us eternal without fracture
